name: S2T-RLHF: Hierarchical Credit Assignment for Stable Preference-Based RLHF
summary: arXiv:2607.18258v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) with preference-based reward models often exhibits unstable training dynamics. A key contributing f...
description: arXiv:2607.18258v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) with preference-based reward models often exhibits unstable training dynamics. A key contributing factor is that standard RLHF relies on a single sequence-level scalar reward, which is propagated to token-level policy updates and leaves credit assignment within a response inherently ambiguous. Rece...
author: Wei Chen, Guanghui Zhu, Yafei Li, Limin Wang, Yihua Huang
